headline: Barron's Latest Picks And Pans: Amazon, Johnson Controls, Porsche, Walmart And More
summary:
The cover story in this weekend's Barron's offers investment opportunities as Europe's economy and markets rebound.
	Other featured articles discuss European airline stocks ready to soar, the worst retail stocks of the first half of 2021 and the passing of the baton at Amazon.

headline: 'Fast Money' Picks For July 6
summary: On CNBC's "Fast Money Final Trades," Tim Seymour said he likes Walmart Inc (NYSE: WMT). The stock has underperformed this year, but Seymour likes the valuation.
